payload.answer: I cannot safely commit this as durable memory without more context about which Sam is meant and what the note specifically says.

entity_resolution.reason: The available context is insufficient to uniquely identify which Sam is referenced, so no durable entity resolution should be committed.

payload.intent: Assess whether to commit an ambiguous note about Sam as durable memory under low confidence and no cloud escalation.

memory_cards.statement: There is an ambiguous note involving someone named Sam, but the model confidence is too low to commit it as durable memory without clarification.

details: No superseded or deleted facts present.

repair_options: Clarify which Sam is being referenced.
Provide the exact note or fact to store.
If there are multiple Sams, add distinguishing details such as role, relationship, or context.
